originalTitle: Many big oil tankers remain stuck in the Strait of Hormuz — and may not return once they escape
summary: There’s doubt massive tankers, once the backbone of global crude flows, will be returning in quite the same numbers to the Middle East.
content: There’s doubt massive tankers, once the backbone of global crude flows, will be returning in quite the same numbers to the Middle East.
chineseTitle: 许多大型油轮仍滞留在霍尔木兹海峡，一旦逃脱可能不会返回
chineseSummary: 人们怀疑，曾经是全球原油流动支柱的大型油轮是否会以同样数量返回中东。
chineseContent: 人们怀疑，曾经是全球原油流动支柱的大型油轮是否会以同样数量返回中东。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
